stages.name: Request and Initiation
stages.summary: Establishes source context, contract category, completeness, and initial routing signals.
stages.mvp_shape: Single group with optional validation branch
stages.notes: Intake agent plus metadata validation agent.

stages.name: Authoring and Drafting
stages.summary: Creates the draft package and recommends approved clause language.
stages.notes: Drafting agent plus clause recommendation agent.

stages.name: Internal Review
stages.summary: Summarizes changes and evaluates redlines before broader routing.
stages.notes: Redline analysis agent plus version-diff agent.

stages.name: Compliance Check
stages.summary: Produces policy exceptions, jurisdictional findings, and regulatory obligations.
stages.notes: Policy mapping agent plus regulatory review agent.

stages.name: Negotiation and External Review
stages.summary: Analyzes counterparty changes and recommends fallback language.
stages.notes: Counterparty change analysis agent plus fallback recommendation agent.

stages.name: Approval Routing
stages.summary: Finalizes the approver path and enforces HITL checkpoints.

stages.name: Execution and Signature
stages.summary: Coordinates signature dispatch, completion evidence, and signing exceptions.
stages.notes: Signature orchestration agent plus reminder agent.

stages.name: Post-Execution Obligations
stages.summary: Extracts obligations, milestones, and ownership commitments after execution.
stages.notes: Obligation extraction agent plus task assignment agent.

stages.name: Renewal and Expiry
stages.summary: Tracks notice windows, renewal exposure, and amendment or renegotiation triggers.
stages.notes: Renewal detection agent plus alert prioritization agent.

stages.name: Lifecycle Analytics
stages.summary: Aggregates business-stage outcomes, backlog, risk, and renewal analytics across the portfolio.
stages.notes: Reporting agent plus insight summarization agent.
